title: Citrusy Gooey Slovakian Chicken Stew
description: Rich, creamy chicken stew with a bright citrus kick and a deep, roasted spice layer, finished with fullfat sour cream for a silky finish.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic, smoked paprika, and caraway seeds; cook for 1‑2 minutes until fragrant, letting the spices brown lightly (bhuna style).
Add the chicken cubes and brown them on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Pour in the low‑sodium chicken broth, reduce heat to low, and simmer, covered, for 25 minutes until the chicken is tender. If desired, add diced potatoes during the last 10 minutes of simmering.
Stir in the freshly squeezed lime juice and adjust seasoning with a pinch of salt if needed. Let the stew simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
Fold in the full‑fat sour cream, stirring gently until the mixture is silky and heated through. Do not boil after adding sour cream to prevent curdling.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley before serving.
